title: Pathfinding System
description: Hierarchical cluster-based pathfinding (HPA*) combined with full-world flow fields, with per-team/per-cost-type path graphs

classes.name: ControlPathfinder
static_constants: PathCost costGround, costHover, costLegs, costNaval (static final lambda)
methods: void run() — pathfinding thread loop: queue.run, updateClustersComplete, updateClustersInner, invalidRequests check, updateFields per cache
boolean getPathPosition(Unit, Vec2 destination, Vec2 mainDestination, Vec2 out, boolean[] noResultFound) — main entry; raycast shortcut or flow field lookup
void initializePathRequest(request, team, costId, unitX, unitY, goalX, goalY) — findClosestNode x2, clusterAstar, addFlowCluster along path
IntSeq clusterAstar(PathRequest, pathCost, startNodeIndex, endNodeIndex) — A* over cluster graph nodes
float innerAstar(team, PathCost, minX,minY,maxX,maxY, startPos, goalPos, ...) — A* within a single cluster; returns -1 if no path
Cluster updateCluster(team, pathCost, cx, cy) — scans cluster edges to find portals, then calls updateInnerEdges
void updateInnerEdges(team, PathCost, cx, cy, Cluster) — connects portals within cluster via innerAstar; stores IntraEdge costs
void updateFields(FieldCache, nsToRun) — BFS flow field propagation across cluster weight arrays
void addFlowCluster(FieldCache, cx, cy, boolean addingFrontier) — registers cluster weight array; seeds frontier from adjacent clusters
int findClosestNode(team, pathCost, tileX, tileY) — A* from tile to nearest portal node
int makeNodeIndex(cx, cy, dir, portal) — packs cluster+dir+portal into NodeIndex
void checkEdges(PathRequest, team, pathCost, current, goal, cx, cy, LongSeq) — relaxes A* edges during clusterAstar
void updateTile(Tile) — calls updateSingleTile on linked tiles
void updateSingleTile(Tile) — queues cluster updates for affected clusters
void updateClustersComplete(clusterIndex) — updateCluster + clusterChanged for all teams/costs
void clusterChanged(team, pathCost, cx, cy) — marks PathRequests as invalid if their field overlaps changed cluster
static boolean solid(team, PathCost, x, y)
static boolean nearPassable(initialCost, team, PathCost, pos)
static float heuristic(a, b) — manhattan distance
static void checkEvents() — registers WorldLoad/Reset/TileChange/update events once

classes.name: Cluster
fields: IntSeq[] portals [4] — per direction, packed (from,to) ranges of passable edge tiles
LongSeq[][] portalConnections [4][] — per direction, per portal: list of IntraEdge longs

classes.name: Pathfinder
static_constants: int costGround=0, costLegs=1, costNaval=2, costNeoplasm=3, costNone=4, costHover=5, maxCosts=8
fields: int[] tiles — packed PathTile data for whole world
methods: void run() — per-interval: queue.run, updateTargets for dirty fields, updateFrontier
Flowfield getField(Team, costType, fieldType) — cache lookup/create + queue registerPath
Tile getTargetTile(Tile, Flowfield) — flow field next-step lookup with diagonal support and avoidance
Tile getTargetTile(Tile, Flowfield, boolean diagonals, int avoidanceId)
int packTile(Tile) — encodes tile properties into PathTile int
int get(x, y) — raw tile data access
void updateTargets(Flowfield) — increments search, seeds frontier
void updateFrontier(Flowfield, nsToRun) — BFS flow field expansion
void registerPath(Flowfield) — setup + add to threadList/mainList

classes.name: EnemyCoreField
methods: void getPositions(IntSeq out) — targets enemy cores + spawn points; supports randomWaveAI targeting random block flags

classes.name: PositionTarget
methods: void getPositions(IntSeq out) — targets single world position; refreshRate=900ms

classes.name: PathfindQueue
classes.note: Priority queue used for A* in ControlPathfinder (innerFrontier) and per-PathRequest frontier

classes.name: PathTileStruct → PathTile
classes.note: @Struct annotation generates PathTile static helper class
fields: boolean solid, liquid, legSolid, nearLiquid, nearGround, nearSolid, nearLegSolid, deep, damages, allDeep, nearDeep, teamPassable

relationships: ControlPathfinder uses NodeIndex, IntraEdge, FieldIndex (generated @Struct helpers)
Cluster contains IntSeq[] portals and LongSeq[][] portalConnections (IntraEdge packed)
Pathfinder.updateTile() calls controlPath.updateTile() — cross-dependency between Pathfinder and ControlPathfinder
PathTile (generated from PathTileStruct) used by Pathfinder.packTile and all PathCost lambdas
key_workflows: UNIT PATH QUERY: getPathPosition(unit,dest,out) → raycast shortcut check → lookup PathRequest → getCost(FieldCache,x,y) per tile → output next Vec2 position

NEW REQUEST: create PathRequest → queue.post(recalculatePath) → initializePathRequest → findClosestNode (innerAstar to nearest portal) → clusterAstar (A* on portal graph) → addFlowCluster along path → flow field computed in run() via updateFields
TILE CHANGE: Pathfinder.updateTile → packTile + controlPath.updateTile → queueClusterUpdate → run() calls updateClustersComplete/Inner → clusterChanged → invalidRequests → recalculatePath
FLOW FIELD UPDATE: updateFields(FieldCache) — BFS from goalPos through cluster weight arrays; triggered each thread loop iteration; time-budgeted via nsToRun
CLUSTER BUILD: updateCluster(team,cost,cx,cy) — scans 4 edges for passable runs (portals) → updateInnerEdges → innerAstar between all portal pairs → stores IntraEdge costs in portalConnections
important_notes: ControlPathfinder: HPA* (Hierarchical Pathfinding A*) — portal-graph A* + per-destination flow fields per cluster. Thread-safe via TaskQueue; clusters[team][costId][clusterIdx]
Pathfinder: simpler full-world flow fields (Dijkstra BFS) per team/cost/fieldType. Used for wave enemy targeting via EnemyCoreField. Cache Flowfield[256][8][10]
PathCost: functional interface with 4 implementations in ControlPathfinder (ground/hover/legs/naval) and 6 in Pathfinder (ground/legs/naval/neoplasm/none/hover)
clusterSize=12 tiles; clusters keyed by team+costId; portal = contiguous passable run on cluster edge stored as packed (from,to) int
NodeIndex packs (cluster 22bit, dir 2bit, portal 8bit) into int; IntraEdge packs (dir 8bit, portal 8bit, cost float) into long; FieldIndex packs (pos, costId 8bit, team 8bit) into long
Two thread safety models: ControlPathfinder uses volatile+TaskQueue; Pathfinder uses synchronized(path.targets) for target list updates
PathRequest caches raycast results per tile position to avoid per-frame raycasting; oldCache allows smooth transitions during field recalculation
